en.extract:
The slaty-backed thornbill (Acanthiza robustirostris) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae.
It is endemic to Australia.

The '''slaty-backed thornbill''' ('''''Acanthiza robustirostris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Acanthizidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Australia]].
